phases.name: Contract and kit fix
phases.scope: Schema, canonical example, paired installers, gates, agents, tests, and docs.
phases.gate: Exact fixtures, installer E2E, paired gates, manifest suite, and dual post judges.

phases.name: Release and consumer migration
phases.scope: Release v0.10.x, migrate social-ops, refresh agents and hooks, and prove VS Code chat routing.
phases.gate: Linux and Windows release green, consumer gates green, and warning-free VS Code proof.

phases.name: Social structure and product grounding
phases.scope: Shared social skills and source-backed product profiles in a separate run.
phases.gate: Separate intake, tournament, phase ledger, and semantic gate.
